description: Cross-SDK authority matching test vectors (SAN-224). Both Python and TS SDKs must return the same decision for every vector.

vectors.rationale: exact match: normalized forms are identical
exact match after normalization: both normalize to delete.file
exact match after normalization: case and separator differences collapse
exact match after normalization: camelCase and snake_case normalize identically
non-match: delete != delete.user; substring is not a valid match
F-005 repro: read is not a match for bread; exact only, no substring
non-match: patch != api.patch.page; partial word is not a match without glob
non-match: create.file != delete.file
glob prefix match: read.user.profile matches read.*
glob suffix match: user.delete matches *.delete
glob wildcard: * matches any non-empty string
glob contains match: user.delete.file matches *delete*
glob non-match: read does not satisfy read.* (requires at least one char after read.)
glob non-match: delete.user does not start with read.
normalization robustness: send.email and sendEmail both normalize to send.email; exact match
NFKC robustness: fullwidth F (U+FF26) normalizes to ASCII F before camelCase splitting; both normalize to delete.file
separatorless fallback: file.delete and filedelete stripped to filedelete; exact stripped match
separatorless fallback: send.email and sendemail stripped to sendemail; exact stripped match
degenerate: empty pattern never matches any action
degenerate: empty action never matches any pattern
degenerate: even the wildcard * does not match an empty action
